name: Cho'Gath

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Carnivore
passive.description_source: Innate: Whenever  Cho'Gath kills an enemy, it  heals and restores  mana.

effects.description: Innate: Whenever Cho'Gath kills an enemy, it heals for 18 : 56 (based on level) health and restores 4.72 : 10.04 (based on level) mana.

passive.description: Innate: Whenever Cho'Gath kills an enemy, it heals for 18 : 56 (based on level) health and restores 4.72 : 10.04 (based on level) mana.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Carnivore will also trigger when Cho'Gath destroys a turret, but not from other structures.

basic_ability_1.name: Rupture
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Cho'Gath ruptures the target location, dealing magic damage and  knocking up enemies within,  slowing them upon landing.

effects.context_notes: Active: Cho'Gath ruptures the target location after a 0.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Cho'Gath ruptures the target location after a 0.627 seconds delay, granting sight of the area before dealing magic damage to enemies within and knocking them up for 1 second, and afterwards slowing them by 60% for 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The delay before the rupture does not include the cast time.

basic_ability_2.name: Feral Scream
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Cho'Gath roars in a cone, dealing magic damage and  silencing enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Cho'Gath roars in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.
Enemy champions and Rift Scuttlers hit are also silenced for a duration.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Cho'Gath roars in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

basic_ability_3.name: Vorpal Spikes
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Cho'Gath's next few basic attacks launch forth deadly spikes, dealing magic damage to enemies hit based on  Feast stacks and each target's maximum health, and  slowing them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Cho'Gath empowers its next 3 basic attacks within 6 seconds to gain 50 bonus range and launch a blast of spikes on-attack in the target's direction.
Active: Cho'Gath empowers its next 3 basic attacks within 6 seconds to gain 50 bonus range and launch a blast of spikes on-attack in the target's direction.
Active: Cho'Gath empowers its next 3 basic attacks within 6 seconds to gain 50 bonus range and launch a blast of spikes on-attack in the target's direction.
Active: Cho'Gath empowers its next 3 basic attacks within 6 seconds to gain 50 bonus range and launch a blast of spikes on-attack in the target's direction.
Active: Cho'Gath empowers its next 3 basic attacks within 6 seconds to gain 50 bonus range and launch a blast of spikes on-attack in the target's direction.

effects.description: The width of the blast of spikes increases based on Cho'Gath's character size modifier when they launch, including but not limited to the bonus from Feast stacks.
Vorpal Spikes resets Cho'Gath's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Cho'Gath empowers its next 3 basic attacks within 6 seconds to gain 50 bonus range and launch a blast of spikes on-attack in the target's direction. Enemies struck are dealt magic damage and slowed by an amount that decays over 1.5 seconds. The damage is modified against monsters.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The missiles are launched from an offset 25 units in front of Cho'Gath and towards the target's location on-attack-complete.
Manual review (2026-02-25): Vorpal Spikes is cast-primed and attack-cadence-coupled; cast activates the empowered attack window while spike-projectile damage resolves on empowered-hit events.

ultimate.name: Feast
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Cho'Gath devours an enemy, dealing true damage based on Cho'Gath's bonus health. If this attack kills the target, Cho'Gath gains a permanent Feast  stack that infinitely stacks.

effects.context_notes: Active: Cho'Gath attempts to eat the target enemy, dealing them true damage.
Active: Cho'Gath attempts to eat the target enemy, dealing them true damage.

effects.description: If the target is killed, Cho'Gath gains a stack of Feast. Only 6 stacks can be gained from non-epic monsters or minions.

effects.context_notes: Each stack of Feast increases the cast range of the ability by 2.
Each stack of Feast increases the cast range of the ability by 2.
Each stack of Feast increases the cast range of the ability by 2.

ultimate.description: Active: Cho'Gath attempts to eat the target enemy, dealing them true damage. Against non- champions, the base damage is modified.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The increased size stacks additively with other size increases.

Manual verification (2026-02-24): Feast is a unit-targeted cast with 0.25-second windup; damage resolves on hit and only then checks kill-confirm stack gain. Non-champion stack cap applies only to non-epic monster/minion takedowns, while champion and epic takedowns continue stack growth and visibly increase size/range.

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)

sources.used_for: manual behavior re-verification for Vorpal Spikes cast-activation timing, empowered-hit cadence, and projectile-on-attack resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
